-- 3 of 7 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 3: Secrets of Copy Strategy
Discover how to get ideas for sales copy on demand.
In this video, you’ll discover…
• How simple math can help you generate hundreds of copy ideas.
• Instantly create copy that stands out from the crowd with this technique.
• How to write headlines that get attention and compel prospects to continue on.
• Why you should love and deliberately create bad ideas.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 7 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
Lesson 3: Secrets of Copy Strategy
Exercises
1. Set a timer for 20 minutes and write 50 ideas for headlines for your sales letter without
any self-editing. Just do it. Trust me. A great idea may well be waiting at number 50.
Stop at 49 and you’ll never know.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 7 --

A-List Copywriting Secrets 1.01
2. Apply the “simple math” technique and come up with 5 more variations.
3. Use the “opposite” technique to rewrite 15 of your headlines.
(c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
